description: Updated Roman sandals have never looked this good. These metallic black sandals from catwalk are versatile enough to go with everything: from jeans, to shorts and skirts. UpperOverlapping straps with a metallic sheen criss-crossing the forefoot and midfoot for added styleSynthetic leather ankle strap for a snug FitSoft feel lining on the ankle strap for added comfortTextured footbed in an ergonomic design for extra comfortOutsoleTPU outsole with heelTextured pattern on the forefoot and flower heel for better gripSandal CareWipe surface with soft, clean cloth to remove dustDo not use a drier or store in direct sunlight
